4. 把文案和趋势图一起发送到飞书

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking: Let me execute the steps as instructed for the international flight daily push.

The script already says "飞书文字推送成功" and "飞书趋势图推送成功" - it seems the ctrip_tracker.py script already sent the content to Feishu directly. So the task is complete.
